julesThoughtProcess: I chose neon magenta (#FF00FF) because it pops brightly against the stark black and represents the glitched, chaotic nature of a cyberpunk universe. I positioned this block near the lower middle quadrant to balance the visual weight of other bright neon elements in the Quadtree mosaic.
storyPanel: A glitch in the system, an anomaly taking form. In the lower sector's shadows, this entity feeds on corrupted data streams, glowing with a fierce magenta light that warns corporate security of unauthorized access.
